name: electroCore, Inc.
description: electroCore, Inc. is a commercial-stage bioelectronic medicine company. The company is focused on developing and commercializing non-invasive vagus nerve stimulation (nVNS) therapies. Its principal product is gammaCore, a handheld, prescription-only, non-invasive vagus nerve stimulator cleared by the FDA for the prevention and acute treatment of migraine and cluster headaches. electroCore is dedicated to pioneering bioelectronic medicine to improve the lives of patients suffering from serious neurological and other medical conditions.
